title: Barron Trump turns 20: Twenty things you never knew about the most mysterious Trump
summary_full: Barron Trump turns 20 today, and despite spending his entire life in one of the world's most scrutinised families, he remains its most private member. From a $150 million crypto fortune and a yerba mate start-up to quietly reshaping his father's social media strategy, the NYU sophomore is building something of his own. He just hasn't told anyone about it yet.
